Confidential – Internal Legal & Compliance Memo (PDPA/CMSA)
To: Board of Tanjung Agro Holdings Berhad (Company No.: 202101012345 (1498763-X); Tax Ref No.: C8765432109), Level 21, Menara Bintang, 12 Jalan Damar Jaya, 50588 Kuala Mutiara, Wilayah Persekutuan.
From: Puan Norliza Karim, General Counsel, legal@tanjungagro.my, Tel: +60 3-7890 4567.
Re: Project Sawit Hutan – proposed private placement and RM120m sukuk murabahah programme; Bursa LR Para 9.03/9.19 considerations and CMSA s.188 insider prohibitions.
The draft term sheet with Arwana Ridge Partners Sdn Bhd (Reg. No.: 201801023456 (1287654-T); Tax Ref No.: D2345678901) contemplates 60,000,000 new shares at RM1.22 and covenant package tied to FY2027 EBITDA targets (MNPI; not announced).
Financing proceeds to be held in Bintang Capital Bank Berhad account no. 112-345-678901 pending utilisation; account mandate signatories: Encik Faizal Rahman (CFO) and the Company Secretary.
Please note director onboarding for Mr. Jian Wei Lim (Passport No.: A34567891) and address for service at Unit 12-5, Residensi Kenanga Utara, 38 Jalan Laman Seri, 50577 Kuala Mutiara; PDPA consents to be recorded and external releases to mask passport digits.
During the closed period under Paragraph 14.08, trading by directors is restricted; blackout notice issued 28 May 2026, and draft press note DR/IR/2026/05 has not been lodged with Bursa Malaysia Securities Berhad.
Employment letter for CEO-designate to include non-compete and key-man insurance assignment; no disclosure required under Para 9.19 unless compensation exceeds materiality threshold.
Do not circulate the Board Pack (Slide 9 forecasts Q3 margin uplift from 11.2% to 14.0%) outside authorised recipients; treat as MNPI under CMSA.
Vendor master form placeholders seen in HR folder (Name: ______; IC No.: ______; Bank: ______) are templates only and contain no data; prior draft showing NRIC: 000000-00-0000 is invalid and must be purged.
For external queries route to IR only; Public Helpline 1-300-88-1234 is not an authorised channel for deal communications.
PDPA note: collected data limited to purpose of placement and employment; retention per internal Policy PDPA/TAHB/2024-01; requests to dpo@tanjungagro.my.
Anticipated announcement trigger: signing of binding SSA or firm placement commitments; if pricing deviates >10% from VWAP, immediate disclosure is required notwithstanding confidentiality undertakings.
Redacted draft of the sukuk information memorandum references guarantor “Seri Palma Estates Sdn Bhd” (Reg. No.: 202001004321 (1367890-U)); confirm no cross-default to existing RCPS terms.
